div.p: // Calculate byte offset (0 - 3998) uint32_t offset = index * 2;

ul.li: BLNK: Blink (if enabled in Control Reg)

div.p: asm ; pos is index (0-1999) mov dx, 03D4h mov al, 0Eh ; High byte index out dx, al inc dx ; Data port 03D5h mov al, bh ; High byte of pos out dx, al
mov dx, 03D4h mov al, 0Fh ; Low byte index out dx, al inc dx mov al, bl ; Low byte of pos out dx, al
